scripts.build: (command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun run clean || pnpm run clean) && (command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun scripts/generate-manifests.js || node scripts/generate-manifests.js) && (command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun scripts/build-assets.js || node scripts/build-assets.js) && tsup --env.NODE_ENV=development
scripts.build:release: (command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun run clean || pnpm run clean) && (command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun scripts/generate-manifests.js --release || node scripts/generate-manifests.js --release) && (command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun scripts/build-assets.js --minify || node scripts/build-assets.js --minify) && tsup --minify --env.NODE_ENV=production
scripts.check-deps: command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun scripts/check-dependencies.js || node scripts/check-dependencies.js
scripts.prepare: simple-git-hooks && (command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun scripts/generate-manifests.js || node scripts/generate-manifests.js)
scripts.reinstall: rm -rf node_modules bun.lock pnpm-lock.yaml && (command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun install || pnpm install)
scripts.validate: (command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun run check-deps || pnpm run check-deps) && mct validate default PRJINT,UNKJSON,pathlength,PATHLENGTH,BASEGAMEVER,WPACKREFS,JSON,STRICT,ENTITYTYPE,FORMATVER,ITEMTYPE,CHKMANIF,FORBFILE -i build
scripts.validate:report: (command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun run check-deps || pnpm run check-deps) && mct validate default PRJINT,UNKJSON,pathlength,PATHLENGTH,BASEGAMEVER,WPACKREFS,JSON,STRICT,ENTITYTYPE,FORMATVER,ITEMTYPE,CHKMANIF,FORBFILE -i build -o validation_report
scripts.watch: concurrently "tsc -w" "command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun scripts/build-assets.js --watch || node scripts/build-assets.js --watch" "tsup --watch --env.NODE_ENV=development"

simple-git-hooks.pre-commit: command -v bunx >/dev/null 2>&1 && bunx lint-staged || npx lint-staged
